calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Feb-20-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: La Von Granger. Petitioner, Roger L:exin Mai was sworn and examined. The Court grants Decree changing name to Roger Lexin Mai. Decree signed in open court.
